project_type: Vite + React + TypeScript browser app (music generation/playback)
test_framework: None (no test files exist; validation is build-only)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` (tsc -b && vite build) and ensure it exits 0 with no type errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET, Node 22, npm available. No test framework. No Docker setup.
contribution_requirements: Build must pass (tsc -b && vite build). TypeScript strict mode with noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters. verbatimModuleSyntax requires type-only imports use `import type`.
key_patterns: Engine modules in src/engine/ export pure functions. Audio in src/audio/ wraps Tone.js. UI in src/ui/ uses React hooks. Song/Pattern/Track/Hit type hierarchy. TrackRole discriminator drives playback routing. Shared player singleton. Generation is seeded/deterministic via Rng class. MIDI export via @tonejs/midi. Browser downloads via Blob + object URL + anchor click pattern.
directory_structure: src/engine/ = pure generation logic (types, theory, rhythm, harmony, riff, bass, drums, lead, humanize, arranger, midi, tab, random). src/audio/ = Tone.js playback (playback.ts ThallPlayer, rig.ts GuitarRig, ir.ts cab IRs, tonePresets.ts). src/ui/ = React components (App tabs, SongForge, RiffLab, ToneRig, StepGrid, TabView, GenControls, Controls, AISettings). src/ai/ = LLM integration (llm.ts, llmTone.ts, promptToParams.ts).
